summary: Comprehensive testing of P-Nice collagen store admin dashboard completed. All backend APIs (12/12) and frontend UI features working perfectly. Admin authentication, product management, customer tracking, media library, and dashboard analytics fully functional.
passed_tests: Admin login API with correct credentials (admin/pnice2024)
Admin login rejection with invalid credentials
Admin token verification and session management
Dashboard stats API returning products, revenue, orders, subscribers
Admin products CRUD API endpoints
Admin orders retrieval API
Admin customers API with newsletter subscribers
Image upload API with proper file validation
Discount code validation API (WELCOME10, SAVE15, etc.)
Cart tax calculation at 8% rate
Admin logout functionality
Admin login page loads at /admin route
Dashboard UI with stats cards for Products, Revenue, Orders, Subscribers
Products tab with product table and Add/Edit/Delete buttons
Orders tab displaying order history
Customers tab showing newsletter subscribers
Media Library with upload functionality
Navigation between all admin tabs
View Store button navigation
Admin logout redirects to login page
Add Product form modal with all required fields
Responsive design working on tablet (768x1024) and desktop (1920x1080)
Live Stripe integration configured with test keys
In-memory admin session storage working properly
